title: John Jumper离开Google DeepMind加入Anthropic
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Yuchen Jin
@Yuchenj_UW
John Jumper is a Nobel laureate who won the 2024 Nobel Prize with Demis Hassabis.
Now he’s leaving Google DeepMind too, right after Noam Shazeer.
What is going on at Google DeepMind? I had really high hopes for Gemini.
John Jumper
@JohnJumperSci
13h
A bit of news: After nearly 9 years, I have decided to leave Google DeepMind and join Anthropic (after taking some time to recharge). I am incredibly grateful for my time at GDM. @ demishassabis took a real chance letting me lead the AlphaFold team just six months after finishing Show more
4:23 PM · Jun 19, 2026 199.3K Views

discovery_record.discovery_summary: 2024年诺贝尔奖得主John Jumper宣布离开效力近9年的Google DeepMind，加入Anthropic（先休息一段时间）。他因与Demis Hassabis共同领导AlphaFold团队获奖，此次离职紧随Noam Shazeer之后。推主Yuchen Jin对此表示惋惜，并质疑Google DeepMind人才流失现状，称原本对Gemini寄予厚望。

key_excerpts.text: 2024年诺贝尔奖得主John Jumper宣布离开效力近9年的Google DeepMind，加入Anthropic（先休息一段时间）。他因与Demis Hassabis共同领导AlphaFold团队获奖，此次离职紧随Noam Shazeer之后。推主Yuchen Jin对此表示惋惜，并质疑Google DeepMind人才流失现状，称原本对Gemini寄予厚望。
Post Log in Sign up Post Yuchen Jin @Yuchenj_UW John Jumper is a Nobel laureate who won the 2024 Nobel Prize with Demis Hassabis.
Now he’s leaving Google DeepMind too, right after Noam Shazeer.
What is going on at Google DeepMind?
I had really high hopes for Gemini.
John Jumper @JohnJumperSci 13h A bit of news: After nearly 9 years, I have decided to leave Google DeepMind and join Anthropic (after taking some time to recharge).
